title: Glade Air Freshener, Aerosol Room Spray, Relaxing Zen, 300ml (Pack of 4)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
With this limited edition Glade Room Sprays you can imagine yourself on a journey to Lapland We have a full collection of wintery classics with a magical twist for you to discover
Glade Room Spray Arctic Apple Pie will fill the air with the festive fragrance of the holiday season
This air freshener spray is designed to fight tough odors; each burst instantly freshens; lasts up to 7 hours
Arctic Apple Pie fragrance with additional notes of vanilla and mixed berries provide a warm and welcoming aroma, Ideal for the holiday season
Use on a daily basis, or as the final touch after the cleaning routine
description: Ingredients Glade Air Freshener, Aerosol Room Spray, Relaxing Zen, 300ml Directions Shake can well. To freshen the air, point can towards the centre of the room and spray. This product is not recommended for use on fabrics.
